visual: Empty stance with the body folding forward, front hand spearing downward with fingers pointed at the floor as if retrieving a needle.
motion_description: The sequence begins with a half-step forward from the rear left foot, smoothly followed by a continuous weight shift backward onto that leg. The torso then rotates approximately 90 degrees outward to open the chest as the right arm sweeps upward to eye level and the left hand lowers toward the torso. The right foot subsequently steps lightly forward onto its toes to form an empty stance as the upper body begins a deep, deliberate fold forward from the waist. Concluding the steady flow, the right hand spears diagonally downward, pointing its fingers toward the floor, while the left hand hovers closely near the inner right forearm.
